subcodes.first_line: O wondrous off shoot of the sacred Lote-Tree! I am very sorry and sad that, during thy journey, it was not possible to provide appropriate hospitality
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع البدیع من السدره المبارکه از این جهت که در این سفر چنانچه باید و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
